channel.title: GitHub Blade Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Blade in GitHub

item.title: krayin/laravel-crm
item.description: Free & Opensource Laravel CRM solution for SMEs and Enterprises for complete customer lifecycle management.

item.title: creativetimofficial/material-dashboard-laravel-livewire
item.description: Material Dashboard 2 For Laravel Framework 11.x and Up using Livewire

item.title: grocy/grocy
item.description: ERP beyond your fridge - Grocy is a web-based self-hosted groceries & household management solution for your home

item.title: FahimAnzamDip/triangle-pos
item.description: Triangle POS is an open source Inventory Management with POS System. Developed with Laravel 10, Bootstrap 4 & Livewire 3. It's completely free to use.
